title: Basic JavaScript Form Validation
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Form Validation. Focus on implementing HTML5 validation attributes correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Form Validation
description: Create a function that uses HTML5 validation attributes and Constraint Validation API together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Form Validation Project
description: Build a small application that applies HTML5 validation attributes, Constraint Validation API, Custom validity (setCustomValidity) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Form Validation
description: The following code has bugs related to HTML5 validation attributes. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Form Validation
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with HTML5 validation attributes and Constraint Validation API.
